memory:memory/2026-04-23.md:1:13.snippet: # 2026-04-23 - Exchange/Graph startup brief is now working again after fixing `app_settings.exchange_mailbox_email` to `george.broadbent@twiniti.ai`. - Exchange settings are stored in Neon `second-brain.app_settings` and the startup brief should use DB-sourced Exchange creds/identity, not the stale `Secrete.txt` path. - The Exchange auth flow is application-only Graph auth; `/me` is not valid and the mailbox must be queried via `/users/<mailbox>`. - The inbox/calendar issue was caused by an invalid Exchange mailbox value in the DB, not a permission problem. - Current Exchange DB keys now present: `exchange_tenant_id`, `exchange_client_id`, `exchange_client_secret`, `exchange_mailbox_email`.
